title: pasaccardoa
parts: Pasaccardoa has many medicinal parts, such as roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain various bioactive compounds. The roots of Pasaccardoa contain alkaloids like berberine, which have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, while the leaves contain flavonoids like quercetin, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The flowers of Pasaccardoa contain sesquiterpenes like beta-eudesmol, which have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. Additionally, the stem of Pasaccardoa contains glycosides like pasaccardoside, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects.
